name: premortemx
description: Evidence-backed pre-mortem analysis for Codex with multi-agent adjudication, calibration workflows, adaptive guardrails, and a new cross-platform Python runtime path.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-mortem risk analysis with multi-agent adjudication, calibration, and Python runtime support.
interface.longDescription: PreMortemX helps Codex users stress-test releases before execution and validate architectures before implementation by combining pre-mortem reasoning, specialist AI lenses, orchestrated adjudication, readable decision artifacts, calibration workflows, adaptive guardrails, and a lightweight harness for auditability and improvement. v4 adds a parallel Python runtime path for cross-platform execution.
defaultPrompt: Smoke test this plugin and confirm it is active.
Use PreMortemX to run an evidence-backed pre-mortem on this release plan and return a clear Pass, Warn, or Block decision.
Use PreMortemX to validate this architecture and identify credible design risks before implementation.
Assess this design-to-release bundle for credible release blockers and explain the result in plain language.
Run a release-risk pre-mortem with structured override handling and local audit artifacts.
